title: Meaningful Data Counts Interview Protocol
author: Kathleen Gregory
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document includes two interview protocols which formed the basis of a semi-structured interview study. The first protocol was used for conversations with individuals who self-identified as having reused research data, and the second was used to guide discussions with individuals who do not reuse data.
steps_raw: This document includes two interview protocols which formed the basis of a semi-structured interview study. The first protocol was used for conversations with individuals who self-identified as having reused research data, and the second was used to guide discussions with individuals who do not reuse data.
keywords: data reuse, research data, data sharing, data citation
